name: multica-skills
description: Skills that let any AI agent drive the Multica CLI — create agents, assign issues, schedule autopilots, manage the local daemon.

skills.name: multica-setup
skills.description: Install the Multica CLI, authenticate, and bootstrap the local daemon.

skills.name: multica-issues
skills.description: Create, query, update, assign, comment, and inspect execution runs on Multica issues.

skills.name: multica-agents
skills.description: Discover agents in a workspace and delegate work to them.

skills.name: multica-projects
skills.description: Manage Multica projects — sprints, epics, workstreams that group related issues.

skills.name: multica-autopilot
skills.description: Schedule and manually trigger recurring agent tasks via autopilots and cron.

skills.name: multica-daemon
skills.description: Run and diagnose the local Multica agent daemon and manage watched workspaces.
